description: Overall GA 360 has either met or exceeded all of our expectations in terms of features, functionality and reporting. If you're an organization that is trying to improve their data analysis and reporting Google Analytics 360 is a must-have tool.
author: Zach P.
pros: Google Analytics 360 has allowed our organization to get richer data insights and provided a more streamlined way for data collection which helps inform our broader marketing strategies. The advanced website tracking has enabled us to dive deeper into understanding our customers and how they interact with our website. It is by far one of the most valuable tools we have when it comes to analyzing customer data. The platform itself is relatively easy to use, but can get increasingly complex if you require advanced reporting and dashboards.
cons: The user interface itself is great, but things can get a little confusing and complex if you need to set up advanced features that require customization to fit your organizations needs. This will often require additional training or support. The learning curve can be a bit longer depending on the complexity of your analytics and data reporting.

author: Calixte B.
pros: Google analytics is a really easy to use tool, with no cost. It’s really easy to integrate to any website and a lot of solutions support it natively.
cons: Google Analytics is often blocked by browser/browser extension, whereas self-made solution is usually not detected by tracking blocker

description: I appreciate how seamlessly it integrates with the rest of the Google Marketing Platform and "Your business on Google", which makes it much easier to connect analytics data with advertising and optimization efforts. But I don't trust the plug-in for wordpress.
author: Patrick S.
pros: Ability to have one platform for multiple websites. Ease of integration. Driving down on the data is good when looking at website traffic sources. And it's free.
cons: The plug-in for wordpress. I don't feel it is secure, and I pulled the system from my sites after being exposed to multiple hacks. I need to research this more.

description: Much preferred the older UA before compared to GA4. The newer GA4 is not an improvement in any way whatsoever.
author: Ryan ..
pros: It's intuitive enough to use and get the data you need. Easy to learn and use and configurations and customizations are possible.
cons: Universal Analytics was honestly much better. GA4 has not been great since it was in beta. Simple reports that could be pulled with UA before now require custom reports in GA4. Also a lot of the data in GA4 is sampled and you need to request unsampled data or get the data in BQ which is just a cash grab.

description: Having expert helps makes it a lot better, but even without the expert help Google has a lot of resources that are also useful. I highly recommend.
author: Isaac L.
pros: It’s gives us incredible insights of our Shopify store and our mobile app as well. It’s so industry standard I don’t know any business not using google analytics.
cons: It’s has a deceptively simply looking interface for being such a huge and complex technology. The learning curve is very steep.
author_profession: Director of a sales and Business development

review_title: A Comprehensive Review of Google Analytics 360
description: The ability to easily integrate with other Google Marketing Platform tools like Google Ads, for more advanced analysis is a major plus.
author: Anne A.
pros: Google Analytics 360 gives you access to advanced reporting capabilities that are essential for large-scale businesses
cons: Google Analytics 360 gives you access to a massive amount of data, but sometimes it can be overwhelming to sift through all the information.

review_title: The ultimate tool for precise and reliable data on the web.
description: A very good tool—precise, accurate, and reliable.
author: Néstor F.
pros: To track information about traffic, visitors, and valuable actions within my website.
cons: Some functions are somewhat hidden within the platform.

description: good overall not my first choice - i like the ip address grabbers
author: Marvin D.
pros: Designed for enterprises, it integrates online and offline data and puts everything from analytics to attribution together in one powerful package. its feature loaded
cons: its built for larger companies a bit clunky
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Effective Analytics with ease of setup.
description: Google Analytics have been generally effective to provide insights about your websites and the users and visitors. It is an instrument to identify what needs to be changed and improved on your website.
author: Samuel I.
pros: Ease of setup. Insight generation. Free of charge. Real time traffic information
cons: You only have information about users region and not the main area. No access to raw data. No customer support

review_title: Good product but you’ll need some experience
description: Good. The product is robust in its features and capabilities for analytic tracking and analysis, the set up and implementation/comprehension of the information provided requires a very strong base knowledge of web analytics.
author: Tracie B.
pros: I like that Google analytics allows you to have multiple reports for specific analytics (demographics, page views, etc.) that you can easily navigate to within the app.
cons: Google analytics was difficult to set up, understand, and implement without the use of multiple tutorials and self guided teaching.

description: It is one of the indispensable platforms for data-driven digital marketing. Although there are always problems with results from channels other than Google, we can also obtain serious information about website traffic and performance.
author: Atalay C.
pros: We can make our media plans data-driven by seeing all traffic and sales related to the website in detail and from which paid or organic channel they come.
cons: While the results from Google ad platforms are pretty good, the results from other ad platforms never match due to attribution.
author_profession: Senior Manager, SEM and Paid Social

description: I use this tool regularly and it helps us analyze SEO and other marketing efforts across multiple clients. It also provides insights that we can use when developing new content strategies.
author: David V.
pros: Google Analytics has still been able to deliver actionable data even as data restrictions have started to cap the amount of data we can receive. This tool remains critical for marketing and lead attribution.
cons: The UI can be confusing and usually requires looking up ways to get the data that you are looking for.

review_title: Tracking was very much helpful and realistic.
description: It helps us getting data of important points, refining ad creatives, reworking entire funnel strategies. ROI clarity is sharper than ever.
author: Imogen R. A.
pros: Google Analytics 360 gives us summarized campaign performance, user behavior, and other things. The integration with BigQuery is a powerhouse for deep analysis.
cons: The cost is significant, so we need to be sure that we are ready or not for the upgradation to enjoy the maximum result.

review_title: Customer and Lead Data at Your Fingertips
description: Google Analytics provide an invaluable look at customer and lead behavior online. There is no substitute for the traffic analysis offered.
author: Stephan B.
pros: My favorite feature is the attribution paths integration with Google Ads allowing you to see a customer's journey.
cons: It can be tricky to set up correctly and many features are buried under several sub-menus and hidden tabs.

description: Overall, it is and remains a valuable tool that is essential to understanding the performance of your website and business
author: Duncan C.
pros: I love how the tool allows you to track and discover so many unique insights about your customers and visitors to your website
cons: I don't like the challenges GA 360 gives people when they want to make a connection to social media channels like Meta and TikTok

description: Google Analytics 360 is the best tool to keep an eye over your website and app. Is easy to integrate and has the best features for reporting. Google ads integrations is a feature that needs to be mentioned as it gives accurate data for any spendings.
author: Carly P.
pros: Live data stream is my favorite feature, is easy to follow the users engagement related to different events like ads campaign, social posting or newsletter.
cons: The costs is needed to be mentioned here, but overall it worth it.

review_title: best software for Traffic analysis and user attribution tracking
description: Overall i am using this platform for getting to know more about my projects and campaigns traffic and their attributes like demographics, active users, new users and engaged sessions, and based on these metrics i made the changes in my project campaigns to further improve the performance
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I liked the Google analytics for User attributes and Traffic acquisition metrics from google analytics in their reporting where i am getting clear picture about traffic on my project campaigns.
cons: user interface can be more better , the current UI is quiet old, they should go with latest UI design.

author: Alexandra I.
pros: Google Analytics give information and insights to make the best decisions on how to improve online presence
cons: The interface may be overcomplicated for those who have just started with and in fact the amount of data may just be too overwhelming thus making them leave

description: Overall it has given me powerful tools to really understand and grow my online presence. Once you get past the learning curve, its an amazing platform.
author: maza C.
pros: I love the advanced reporting features and the ability to get deep inshights into my website traffic. The dashboards are highly customizable. I really enjoy using this product.
cons: The setup- and learning can be pretty steep if your just starting out. Some features you need to have some technical knowledge. The price is quite high, for a small business.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Google Analytics 360 is the only tool you need!
description: It has been a game changer for our SEO, PPC and Web UX efforts.
author: Adam Z.
pros: I love the in-depth analysis their reports offer. Every KPI and metric a Digital Marketer requires. Simple and effective dashboards make Google Analytics 360 a pleasure to work with.
cons: There are such a vast array of options that continuing education is vital to keeping up with all the new bells and whistles constantly being added.

description: Overall great experience would continue to use it .
author: Ryan S.
pros: What I like most about Google Analytics 360 is you can optimize your campaigns with this software
cons: I didn’t like the navigation of the software at first .

description: If you need any data about your website Google Analytics 360 is the app that can offer. That are not much to say about it, it just offers all available data about the website.
author: Jordan K.
pros: First of all, is easy to setup, connecting Analytics to my website was a piece of cake as I use WordPress with Google plugin. Reports are very complex and easy to get as Google made an easy to navigate. When connecting with Google Ads it can offer great insights about your campaigns.
cons: For the reports I need and get I did not encounter anything I can say I like less.

review_title: So glad I get to use this, it's a real lifesaver!
author: Srujana T.
pros: Piece of cake to set up reports and keep an eye on your website traffic.
cons: Can be a bit of a pain in the neck to use and takes a while to get the hang of, eh.

review_title: Really I dont know, I am just user, not data miner
author: Martin Š.
pros: Connection between others products, cloud
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We found it to be time consuming and of little value. We eventually discontinued all efforts to use the product.
author: Keith T.
pros: Very little to like other than it is provided free. Some information offered did prompt us to try and improve our site.
cons: It takes a considerable amount of time to properly manage / navigate the system. Google seems to keep changing the requirements and for a small business we can’t keep up.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
